name: health_check
description: Health check endpoint for container monitoring and status verification

name: execute_query
description: Execute an instant query against Prometheus.

time.description: Optional RFC3339 or Unix timestamp (default: current time)

name: execute_range_query
description: Execute a PromQL range query with start time, end time, and step interval

start.description: Start time as RFC3339 or Unix timestamp

end.description: End time as RFC3339 or Unix timestamp

name: list_metrics
description: List all available metrics in Prometheus with optional pagination support

limit.description: Maximum number of metrics to return (default: all metrics)

offset.description: Number of metrics to skip for pagination (default: 0)

filter_pattern.description: Optional substring to filter metric names (case-insensitive)

refresh_cache.description: Force a cache refresh to pick up newly scraped metrics (default: False)

name: get_metric_metadata
description: Get metadata (type, help, unit) for metrics. Returns all metric metadata when no metric name is provided.

metric.description: Optional metric name. If provided, returns legacy list format.

filter_pattern.description: Optional substring filter on metric name and descriptions.

limit.description: Maximum number of metrics to return in bulk mode.

offset.description: Number of metrics to skip in bulk mode.

name: get_targets
description: Get information about all scrape targets
